items.title: The Rolling Stones Share New Song With The Cure’s Robert Smith
items.summary: Robert Smith recently earned his first-ever Hot 100 entry as a solo artist thanks to his wonderful Olivia Rodrigo collab "what's wrong with me." Now, the Cure frontman appears on a new Rolling Stones single called "Divine Intervention." The post The Rolling Stones Share New Song With The Cure’s Robert Smith appeared first on Stereogum.

items.title: Blood, Sweat & Tears’ David Clayton-Thomas Dead At 84
items.summary: David Clayton-Thomas, lead singer for late-'60s hitmakers Blood, Sweat & Tears, has passed away. The CBC reports that Clayton-Thomas died on Wednesday at St. Michael's hospital in Toronto. The post Blood, Sweat & Tears’ David Clayton-Thomas Dead At 84 appeared first on Stereogum.

items.title: Cel Ray – “Toxic”
items.summary: Some lyrics cut straight through the bullshit and latch onto whatever weird, mystical life force is rattling around inside me. That’s exactly how I feel about “Toxic" from Chicago absurdist punks Cel Ray, the follow-up to “Price of Gas" off their forthcoming album Cel Rayzer. The post Cel Ray – “Toxic” appeared first on Stereogum.

items.title: Joy Division getting 16-disc live box set ‘Eternal: Live’
items.summary: Eternal: Live features 14 CDs with audio from 16 different performances, plus two DVDs, and more. It’s out September 25.

items.title: Blondshell announces new LP ‘Violins,’ shares title track
items.summary: ”My main goal with this record was to have songs that hit hard,” Blondshell says of her third album.

items.title: Gorillaz bringing “House of Kong” exhibition to NYC ahead of MSG show
items.summary: ”’House of Kong’ is not a retrospective, it’s an audio-visual artwork; an installation that takes a glance backwards in order to identify the path ahead,” artist and creative director Stephen Gallagher says.
